series_metadata.series_description: This record is used by BWC management for when an employee is calling off work for a specific reason. This record contains information about the employee such as their phone number, the reason why the person is calling off and what kind of time they will use for the time they will be absent from work. The record also has another part to it about the Family Medical Leave Act (FMLA). This part has questions asking why and for what reason the person is going to be absent for a long period of time and what the reason is for the absence and if they will be applying for disability.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: These records will be retained for one year then destroyed. ; Electronic: These records will be retained for one year then destroyed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
